title: Limited Cotv Buildings
description: Datapack for limit some generated functional building amount in CTOV's structures
body:
This pack taking advantage from Lithostitched and Patched. 
- Limit the mods' structures are generated only one time in villages with Lithostitched jigsaw and guaranteed pool element.

### Known issue
- **2024-3-25** The CTOV villages generated by Lithostitched jigsaw will be smaller. Has no idea of the reason.
[https://github.com/Apollounknowndev/lithostitched/issues/6](https://github.com/Apollounknowndev/lithostitched/issues/6)
